close_reason: Changed server field from empty-string sentinel to Option<String>, updated all call sites
description: lib.rs:140 'let server = parsed.param("server").unwrap_or("").to_owned();' and lib.rs:103 'server: String'. Using "" to mean 'no server configured' is stringly-typed; resolve_server (lib.rs:192-202) then checks 'if !configured.is_empty()'. Idiomatic: store server as Option<String> on WolfHsmBackend and let resolve_server take Option<&str>. Removes the empty-string special case and makes the 'configured vs not' distinction visible in the type.
title: Empty-string sentinel for 'no server configured'; should be Option<String>
